_comment: Claude UI Workflow explainer — SSL 2026 conference (9 May). Per-LINE generation: each sentence is its own TTS call, chained via request-id. Files: {scene}__{line}.mp3 → stitched per-scene → final listen-through. Finder colour-tag review (blue=keep, red=regen, green=mid) drives selective regen. Em-dashes used as TTS breath markers ONLY (never read by humans, never copied to mailers/READMEs/UI).

lines.text: Sometimes you need a landing page — or to redesign your Shopify site.
Right now — most tools are producing AI slop.
But you can control the variables.
What if you could have agency-quality design — without waiting three weeks — and without paying five to ten grand.
To get started — drop in your chosen URL.
It captures your design system — fonts, brand colours, voice.
Locked down — whilst you make a cup of tea.
Next stage — whilst you wait — it runs through fifteen design databases.
One hundred and sixty-five rules — anti-AI-slop gates, UI and UX frameworks, conversion methodologies.
Claude automates seven of the ten stages.
Then you take the prompt — hand it to Google Stitch — and out come high-quality designs.
Claude picks it up — and refactors all the drifts for a controlled output.
Re Tech UK — Databrill — and The Push Pull Agency.
All cleared the gates at high rates.
Depending on how much time you spend tweaking in Stitch — the process end-to-end, outside of revisions, takes around ten minutes.
In Stitch you can spend hours — or minutes.
Design is subjective — best to get it right for your business.
Pull the repo — and put Claude to work.
Some say pretty doesn't convert.
Yet the world's leading brands — know good design drives emotion and trust.
